arts.sum: Exclusive: Man Utd, Arsenal and Tottenham are eyeing a cut-price deal for Wolves star Matheus Cunha in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man United, Arsenal 'in three-team battle' to steal £15.7m midfielder from Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Liverpool are all competing for the signature of Wolverhampton Wanderers midfielder Joao Gomes, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Dream Arsenal XI vs Man Utd amid Neto pick, Saka cover and Rice role

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Kvaratskhelia CONFIRMATION, Man Utd TRUTH, Chelsea TRIO out
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including news on Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Marcus Rashford and Omar Marmoush. Speaking on his YouTube channel, the Italian transfer expert has announced that Khvicha Kvaratskhelia is close to joining PSG after Antonio Conte confirmed that the player has asked to leave.

arts.ttl: ‘I Once Had Furious Bust-up With Son Heung-min - Now Arsenal Want to Sign me'
arts.sum: The South Korea duo clashed in February 2024 - but could now line up alongside each other in the north London derby.
